notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-370 — the Signal report card now grades over ~6 months instead of ~1: the app loads ~200 days of history (was ~95) so the grader has a ~133-day window (was ~28) — roughly 4–5× the fires behind every score, so tiers firm up far faster. It's one download per share either way, so loading shouldn't slow much. (Beta stays feature-matched to release, keeps the shared price cache, and your beta portfolio stays separate.) Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5). ✉ feedback top-left.
